---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for pi-droid
labels: enhancement
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case / Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution (optional)

If you have an idea for how this could be implemented, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or references related to the feature request.
